name: PER_CONTRACTS_F
description:
This table holds general details of a contract associated to an employment agreement. This is date-tracked. 
Main changes are related to the ability of identifying the set of Employment/Placement Terms this contract belongs to.

columns.Name: CONTRACT_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the beginning of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the end of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_PERSONS.

columns.Name: REFERENCE
columns.Comments: Same as assignment number (for the row that represents work terms).

columns.Name: TYPE
columns.Comments: The type of contract.

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: The status of the contract.

columns.Name: STATUS_REASON
columns.Comments: The reason for the contracts existence.

columns.Name: ACTION_CODE
columns.Comments: Specifies the action performed on the particular record. For example: HIRE.

columns.Name: DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: Description of the contract.

columns.Name: DURATION
columns.Comments: The duration of the contract.

columns.Name: DURATION_UNITS
columns.Comments: The units of time in which the duration is expressed.

columns.Name: CONTRACTUAL_JOB_TITLE
columns.Comments: The contractual job title - N.B. not related to PER_JOBS.

columns.Name: PARTIES
columns.Comments: The signatory parties (other than the employee).

columns.Name: START_REASON
columns.Comments: The reason for the contracts existence.

columns.Name: END_REASON
columns.Comments: The reason for ending the contract.

columns.Name: LEGISLATION_CODE
columns.Comments: LEGISLATION_CODE

columns.Name: NUMBER_OF_EXTENSIONS
columns.Comments: The number of times the contract has been extended.

columns.Name: EXTENSION_REASON
columns.Comments: The reason for extending the contract.

columns.Name: EXTENSION_PERIOD
columns.Comments: The period of time for which the contract has been extended.

columns.Name: EXTENSION_PERIOD_UNITS
columns.Comments: The units of time in which the extension period has been expressed.

columns.Name: CONTRACT_END_DATE
columns.Comments: The date the contract is expected to end

columns.Name: CONTRACT_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Uniquely identifies a contract. If there are multiple contracts under a work relationship,sequence value will be incremented

columns.Name: PERIOD_OF_SERVICE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifies the Employment Level. One to many relationship from PER_PERIODS_OF_SERVICE

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: DOC_STATUS
columns.Comments: This column holds the status of the physical contract.

columns.Name: DOC_STATUS_CHANGE_DATE
columns.Comments: Holds the date that the doc_status column last changed its value.

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Identifies a set of Employment /Placement Terms. Foreign Key to PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_M.
